name: ccxt
description: A JavaScript / TypeScript / Python / C# / PHP cryptocurrency trading library with support for 130+ exchanges
A cryptocurrency trading API with more than 100 exchanges in JavaScript / TypeScript / Python / C# / PHP / Go

scripts.transpileJava: tsx build/javaTranspiler.ts --multi && tsx build/javaTranspiler.ts --ws && tsx build/generateJavaWrappers.ts
scripts.buildGO: go build -C go ./v4 && go build -C go ./v4/pro
scripts.transpileGO: npm run transpileGORest && npm run transpileGOWs
scripts.csharp: npm run transpileCS && npm run transpileCSWs && npm run buildCS
scripts.java: npm run transpileJava && npm run buildJava
scripts.go: npm run transpileGO && npm run buildGO
scripts.force-build//WithoutGo: npm run pre-transpile && npm run force-transpile-fast && npm run csharp && npm run post-transpile && npm run update-badges
scripts.force-build: npm run pre-transpile && npm run go && npm run force-transpile-fast && npm run csharp && npm run java && npm run post-transpile && npm run update-badges
scripts.fumadocs-build: npm run fumadocs-content && cd website && npm run build
scripts.fumadocs-dev: npm run fumadocs-content && cd website && npm run dev
scripts.build: npm run pre-transpile && npm run transpile && npm run post-transpile && npm run update-badges
scripts.force-build: npm run pre-transpile && npm run force-transpile-fast && npm run post-transpile && npm run update-badges
scripts.force-build-slow: npm run pre-transpile && npm run force-transpile && npm run post-transpile && npm run update-badges
scripts.pre-transpile: npm run export-exchanges && npm run vss && npm run tsBuild && npm run emitAPI && npm run tsBuildExamples && npm run copy-python-files && npm run check-js-syntax && npm run bundle
scripts.pre-transpile-js: npm run export-exchanges && npm run vss && npm run emitAPITs && npm run tsBuild && npm run validate-types && npm run tsBuildExamples && npm run check-js-syntax && npm run bundle
scripts.pre-transpile-py: npm run export-exchanges && npm run emitAPIPy
scripts.pre-transpile-php: npm run export-exchanges && npm run emitAPIPhp
scripts.pre-transpile-go: npm run export-exchanges && npm run emitAPIGo
scripts.pre-transpile-js-simple: npm run export-exchanges && npm run emitAPITs && tsc && npm run validate-types
scripts.pre-transpile-cs: npm run export-exchanges && npm run emitAPICs
scripts.pre-transpile-java: npm run export-exchanges && npm run emitAPIJava
scripts.pre-transpile: npm run export-exchanges && npm run vss && npm run tsBuild && npm run emitAPI && npm run validate-types && npm run tsBuildExamples && npm run check-js-syntax && npm run bundle
scripts.pre-transpile-pr: npm run export-exchanges && npm run tsBuild && npm run emitAPI && npm run check-js-syntax
scripts.post-transpile: npm run check-python-syntax && npm run check-php-syntax
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run commonjs-test && node run-tests
scripts.test-base: npm run test-js-base && npm run test-python-base && npm run test-php-base
scripts.test-base-ws: npm run test-js-base-ws && npm run test-python-base-ws && npm run test-php-base-ws
scripts.test-js-base-ws: npm run test-js-cache && npm run test-js-orderbook
scripts.test-python-base-ws: npm run test-python-cache && npm run test-python-orderbook
scripts.test-php-base-ws: npm run test-php-cache && npm run test-php-orderbook
scripts.transpile: npm run transpileRest && npm run transpileWs
scripts.force-transpile: npm run force-transpileRest && npm run force-transpileWs
scripts.dev-force-transpile: npm run fast-force-transpileRest && npm run fast-force-transpileWs
scripts.test-ws-php-base: npm run test-php-cache && npm run test-php-orderbook
scripts.check-syntax: npm run transpile && npm run check-js-syntax && npm run check-python-syntax && npm run check-php-syntax
scripts.check-php-syntax: npm run check-rest-php-syntax && npm run check-ws-php-syntax
npm run check-rest-php-syntax && npm run check-ws-php-syntax
scripts.bundle: npm run bundle-cjs && npm run bundle-browser
scripts.bundle-browser: rspack build -c rspack.config.js && CCXT_MINIMIZE=true CCXT_OUTPUT_FILENAME=ccxt.browser.min.js rspack build -c rspack.config.js
scripts.copy-python-files: npm run copy-python-package && npm run copy-python-license && npm run copy-python-keys && npm run copy-python-readme
